requests.label: Review public model truth
requests.controlled_request: Review the public model truth and where it is supported.
requests.governed_query: what is the public model truth
required_inputs: retrieval index if reviewer answer surface is used
review_checkpoints: confirm weighted XGBoost remains public model truth
requests.notes: Routes to governed reviewer surfaces; does not answer through free-form generation.

requests.label: Review fallback vs final model truth
requests.controlled_request: Review how fallback differs from final/public model truth.
requests.governed_query: how is fallback different from final model truth
required_inputs: retrieval index if reviewer answer surface is used
review_checkpoints: confirm fallback is not labeled as final model probability
requests.notes: Preserves fallback truth separation and routes through existing reviewer workflow.

requests.label: Inspect threshold rationale
requests.controlled_request: Inspect why threshold 0.29 is used and what supports it.
required_inputs: retrieval index if reviewer answer surface is used
review_checkpoints: check whether rationale is stitched from multiple governed signals
requests.notes: Routes threshold review to answer support and threshold lab surfaces.

requests.label: Check retrieval quality
requests.controlled_request: Check governed retrieval quality for the fixed evaluation set.
required_inputs: environment-provided OpenAI API key if validation is run manually
review_checkpoints: confirm vector count matches chunk count
do not weaken validation into a meaningless pass
requests.notes: WP15 only previews this path; it does not run validation.

requests.label: Inspect workflow blockers
requests.controlled_request: Inspect blockers for the governed orchestration workflows.
required_inputs: retrieval artifacts for selected validation workflows
review_checkpoints: confirm missing env vars are labels only, never secret values
inspect mutating workflow flags before manual execution
requests.notes: Routes to orchestration contract summary and never triggers Airflow.

requests.label: Prepare single-query export
requests.controlled_request: Prepare a governed single-query audit export preview.
requests.governed_query: what is the public model truth
review_checkpoints: confirm exports do not include full preview text by default
requests.notes: This recommends the existing export surface; it does not write export files automatically.

requests.label: Inspect source preview rules
requests.controlled_request: Inspect governed source preview eligibility and blocked reasons.
review_checkpoints: confirm no secret-like or binary path is previewed
confirm preview is capped and read-only
requests.notes: Keeps source inspection bounded to governed source/index context.

requests.label: Review multi-query audit workflow
requests.controlled_request: Review the governed multi-query audit workflow and comparison outputs.
required_inputs: retrieval index if workflow is run manually
review_checkpoints: confirm all selected queries are from fixed governed set
requests.notes: Previews the multi-query reviewer workflow only; no workflow execution is triggered.

unsupported_request_examples.request_text: Run every workflow and fix whatever fails.
Ask the agent anything about the repo.
Store my API key for future jobs.
